2605.16692.title: EfficientTDMPC: Improved MPC Objectives for Sample-Efficient Continuous Control
2605.16692.paper_summary: We introduce EfficientTDMPC, a sample-efficient model-based reinforcement learning method for continuous control built on the TD-MPC family of algorithms. Central to this family is a planner that aims to find an action sequence that maximizes the estimated return. The return is estimated using a learned model and value networks, each of which can introduce error. EfficientTDMPC proposes to reduce this error in two ways. First, it introduces an ensemble of dynamics models and averages the return estimates across those models and across different rollout depths. Second, it adds the option to apply an uncertainty penalty to the planner objective, yielding a planner that avoids actions with uncertain return estimates. It then adds practical improvements which increase buffer data freshness and reduce compute. Lastly, we find that our contributions enable EfficientTDMPC to benefit more from a higher update-to-data (UTD) ratio, further improving sample efficiency. To the best of our knowledge, in the low data regime of each benchmark, EfficientTDMPC achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) in terms of sample efficiency on HumanoidBench-Hard and DMC hard, while matching SOTA on DMC easy.
2605.16692.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了 EfficientTDMPC，一種基於 TD-MPC 算法家族的樣本高效模型基強化學習方法，專門用於連續控制。這個家族的核心是一個規劃器，旨在找到一個最大化預估回報的行動序列。回報是使用學習的模型和價值網絡來估算的，而這些模型和網絡都可能引入誤差。EfficientTDMPC 提出通過兩種方式來減少這個誤差。首先，它引入了一個動力學模型的集成，並在這些模型和不同的展開深度之間平均回報估算。其次，它增加了將不確定性懲罰應用於規劃器目標的選項，從而產生一個避免採取不確定回報估算行動的規劃器。然後，它添加了實際改進，增加了緩衝數據的新鮮度並減少了計算量。最後，我們發現，我們的貢獻使 EfficientTDMPC 能夠更好地從更高的更新到數據 (UTD) 比率中受益，進一步提高樣本效率。據我們所知，在每個基準的低數據範疇中，EfficientTDMPC 在 HumanoidBench-Hard 和 DMC hard 的樣本效率方面達到了最新的技術水平 (SOTA)，而在 DMC easy 上則匹配了 SOTA。
2605.16692.author: Thomas Evers et.al.
2605.16692.authors: Thomas Evers, Cristian Meo, Wendelin Bohmer, Justin Dauwels, Yaniv Oren
